svg.title: Verge architecture diagram
svg.desc: An edge-native blogging platform on Cloudflare. A central Verge Worker handles fetch, queue, and Durable Object invocations, backed by D1, R2, KV, Queues, Workers AI, and a CommentRoom Durable Object. External services GitHub OAuth and Resend handle auth and email. Numbered arrows show the async publish flow and the cached read path.
svg.text: 2. Worker enqueues process_post → 3. Queue handler consumes batch
4. Workers AI generates summary + tags → 5. KV memoizes by input hash
6. D1 marks status=published → 7. Cache API invalidates /post/[slug]
8. Resend fan-out · 9. Reader GET /post/[slug] hits Cache · 10. WebSocket to DO
